changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-mcp-proxy/src/proxy.rs (5.5% coverage, 3/55 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- get_peer() - async peer connection with caching (lines 40-76)
- initialize() - ServerHandler impl (lines 104-119)
- list_prompts() - forwarding to upstream (lines 122-136)
- get_prompt() - forwarding to upstream (lines 139-154)
- list_tools() - tool filtering logic (lines 160-206)
- call_tool() - forwarding to upstream (lines 213-228)
- get_info() - returns server info (lines 231-235)

These are the core proxy behaviors. Testing requires mocking the upstream MCP server or using rmcp test utilities. The filtering in list_tools() is particularly important since it is the main value-add of this crate."
Test mcp-proxy FilteringMcpProxy server handler methods
